name: task_set_status
description: Transition a task to a new status. Lean prompt tasks run directly as `in-progress`; discovery happens inside that single session attempt. `needs-input` pauses execution and writes a task-scoped handoff for the next same-task session attempt. `done` runs verification hooks (gitleaks, framework integrity, commit-info), then closes the provider session. `failed` archives diagnostic state and emits a notification; `skipped` is terminal for work determined unnecessary before or during execution; `cancelled` is terminal with no recovery; `todo` requeues a task after answer/retry; `needs-review` parks a completed task pending human review (prefer `task_mark_needs_review` to capture the pending commit SHA atomically).

status.description: New status. The runtime enforces the transition table and returns 422 invalid transition when the move isn't allowed.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason, written to the activity log.

skip_reason.description: Optional machine-readable skip reason when status is skipped, e.g. condition-not-met or not-applicable.

skip_detail.description: Optional human-readable skip detail when status is skipped.
